a.curator_notes: TKKG is a long-running German children's detective Hörspiel series. The series spans two Spotify artists: 'TKKG' (modern episodes 100-239) and 'TKKG Retro-Archiv' (classic episodes 1-99). Episode numbering uses 'NNN/' format for episodes 1-199 and 'Folge N:' format for episodes 200+. Excluded: 'TKKG Junior' artist (separate spinoff series for younger children with its own episode numbering 1-41), compilation albums ('Eiskalte Fälle', 'Gruselige Fälle', 'Urlaubs-Fälle'), and duplicate Kopfhörer-Hörspiel version of episode 216. Special releases like Adventskalender and the movie tie-in are included as standalone episodes. Note: Episode 37 is missing from the Retro-Archiv (gap between 36 and 38).
